case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. INTERNATIONAL FIDELITY INSURANCE CO.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL FIDELITY INSURANCE CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL FIDELITY INSURANCE CO. $68,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $68,335.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
